message:
refactor(discord,telegram): extract client and error modules for standard FCP layout

Discord:
- Add DiscordClient wrapper in client.rs with secret-redacting Debug impl
  to prevent bot credentials from leaking to logs
- Standard from_config constructor matching other FCP connectors
- Deref to underlying DiscordApiClient for transparent method access
- Register new client module in lib.rs

Telegram:
- Add error.rs re-exporting TelegramError and TelegramResult from client
  module for consistency with standard FCP connector layout
- Register new error module in lib.rs

Continues the module extraction work from commit e89dfd4a.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+//! Error types for the Telegram connector.
+//!
+//! The canonical error type [`TelegramError`] and its
+//! [`ConnectorErrorMapping`](fcp_sdk::migration::ConnectorErrorMapping)
+//! implementation live in [`crate::client`]. This module re-exports them
+//! for consistency with the standard FCP connector layout.
+
+pub use crate::client::TelegramError;
+
+/// Convenience alias used throughout the connector.
+pub type TelegramResult<T> = Result<T, TelegramError>;
